## Summary

Describe the change.

## Verification

- [ ] Ran the issue or plan verification command.
- [ ] Added notes for any verification that could not run.

## Symphony / Harness Checklist

- [ ] Updated relevant docs when behavior, architecture, or operating rules changed.
- [ ] Left runtime state, logs, workspaces, credentials, and generated local files out of git.
- [ ] Confirmed no obsolete planning or project-specific references were introduced.
- [ ] Confirmed no secrets or local tokens were added.
- [ ] Recorded follow-up debt in `.agent-harness/docs/exec-plans/tech-debt-tracker.md` when needed.
- [ ] Included proof of work or explained why this PR only changes base process.

## Risk

List known risks or write `None`.
